description: Separation page /separacao with scan input, audio feedback, 4 tabs (Aguardando NF, Pendentes, Embalados, Expedidos), undo bip, auto-polling

userStories.title: Audio feedback utility (Web Audio API)
userStories.description: As the system, I need audio feedback functions so that operators get immediate audible confirmation of scan results in the warehouse environment.
acceptanceCriteria: Create src/components/separacao/audio-feedback.ts
Export 4 functions: playSuccess(), playError(), playComplete(), playAlreadyDone()
playSuccess: 880Hz tone, 100ms duration (short high-pitched beep)
playError: 220Hz tone, 200ms duration played twice (low double beep)
playComplete: ascending melody 440→880→1320Hz, 150ms each note
playAlreadyDone: 440Hz tone, 200ms single beep
All functions use OscillatorNode — no audio files
AudioContext created lazily on first call (requires user interaction to initialize)
Functions are no-op if AudioContext creation fails (graceful degradation)
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Base components: item row and pedido card
userStories.description: As an operator, I need to see each order with its items, bip progress, and location so I can find and confirm items in the warehouse.
acceptanceCriteria: Create src/components/separacao/item-separacao-row.tsx — displays one item with: sku, gtin, descricao, localizacao (bold badge for easy reading), quantidade_bipada/quantidade_pedida progress, bipado_completo visual (green check icon when done, open circle when pending)
When localizacao is null, show 'Sem localização' with muted text and MapPinOff icon from Lucide

Create src/components/separacao/pedido-separacao-card.tsx — displays one order with: header showing numero, cliente, ecommerce, forma_envio, decisao. Progress bar showing X/Y itens bipados. List of item-separacao-row children
Both components accept typed props (define interfaces in the component files)
Use Tailwind classes directly, zinc-based palette, consistent with existing app styling
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Scan input component with undo toast
userStories.description: As an operator, I need a scan field that auto-focuses, processes barcodes, gives audio feedback, and offers undo for mistakes.
acceptanceCriteria: Create src/components/separacao/scan-input.tsx
Renders a text input with auto-focus on mount and after each scan
On Enter/submit, calls POST /api/separacao/bipar with { codigo } using sisoFetch (from auth-context, includes X-Session-Id header)
Clears input automatically after processing response
Calls audio feedback functions based on response: parcial/item_completo → playSuccess(), pedido_completo → playComplete(), 404 → playError(), 409 → playAlreadyDone()
On successful bip (parcial/item_completo), shows Sonner toast with 'Bip registrado — SKU (N/M)' and a 'Desfazer' action button active for 10 seconds
Desfazer button calls POST /api/separacao/desfazer-bip with { pedido_id, produto_id } from the bip response, then shows 'Bip desfeito' confirmation toast
Accepts onBipProcessed callback prop to trigger parent refetch/optimistic update
Input is disabled while processing a bip request (prevents double-scan)
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Main page with Pendentes tab and galpão filtering
userStories.description: As an operator, I need the main separation page with tabs and auto-filtered orders for my warehouse.
acceptanceCriteria: Create src/app/separacao/page.tsx as 'use client' page
4 pill-style tabs using existing Tabs component from src/components/ui/tabs.tsx: 'Aguardando NF', 'Pendentes', 'Embalados', 'Expedidos'
Each tab shows count badge from API response
Auto-filter by operator's galpão derived from cargo in auth context (operador_cwb → CWB, operador_sp → SP)
Admin users see a galpão selector dropdown at the top to choose which galpão to view
Create src/components/separacao/tab-pendentes.tsx — fetches GET /api/separacao?status=pendente (and em_separacao) via TanStack Query with refetchInterval: 10000
Renders scan-input at top, then list of pedido-separacao-card ordered by data ASC
Uses sisoFetch for all API calls (X-Session-Id header)
Shows empty-state component when no orders
Mobile-friendly layout (max-w-3xl)
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Aguardando NF tab
userStories.description: As an operator, I need to see orders awaiting invoice authorization so I know what's coming next.
acceptanceCriteria: Create src/components/separacao/tab-aguardando-nf.tsx
Fetches GET /api/separacao?status=aguardando_nf via TanStack Query with refetchInterval: 10000
Each order shows: numero, cliente, ecommerce, decisao, quantidade de itens
Orders in aguardando_nf for more than 2 hours show a yellow 'Atenção' warning badge (compare data field to current time)
Read-only — no scan input, no bip actions
Admin users see a 'Forçar Pendente' button that calls PATCH /api/separacao/{pedidoId}/forcar-pendente
Non-admin users do not see the force button
Shows empty-state when no orders
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Embalados and Expedidos tabs
userStories.description: As an operator, I need to see packed orders and mark them as shipped, and view already-shipped orders.
acceptanceCriteria: Create src/components/separacao/tab-embalados.tsx
Fetches GET /api/separacao?status=embalado via TanStack Query with refetchInterval: 10000
Each order shows: numero, embalado_em (formatted time), separado_por (who packed), etiqueta_status badge
Orders with etiqueta_status = 'falhou' show red badge
Individual 'Marcar como Expedido' button per order that calls POST /api/separacao/expedir with single pedido_id
Batch 'Expedir Selecionados' button with checkboxes to select multiple orders, calls POST /api/separacao/expedir with array of pedido_ids
Disabled 'Reimprimir Etiqueta' button with tooltip 'Impressão será configurada em breve' (placeholder for PRD 7)
Create src/components/separacao/tab-expedidos.tsx
Fetches GET /api/separacao?status=expedido via TanStack Query with refetchInterval: 10000
Read-only list showing: numero, data, cliente — historical view, no actions
Both tabs show empty-state when no orders
Typecheck passes
